scripts.build: bun run build:native && bun run build:binary
scripts.test: bun run build:native && bun run test:core && bun run test:languages && bun run test:distribution && bun run test:system
scripts.test:core: bun test --max-concurrency 1 tests/contract tests/unit tests/integration tests/e2e/cli-lifecycle.test.ts tests/e2e/logs.test.ts tests/e2e/query.test.ts tests/e2e/query-generated.test.ts tests/skill
